slides.headline: 20 applications. 6 vetted.
slides.eyebrow: Behind the Scenes · How vetting works

slides.body: Here's the exact checklist we use — and why we turned down 14 genuinely talented composers. ↓

The vetting process isn't about picking the "best" music.
It's about picking music that's ready.
Because our credibility with music supervisors depends on what we pitch to them.

✓ Original compositions only (zero uncleared samples)
✓ Clear rights chain (master + publishing confirmed, documented)
✓ Lossless files available (WAV or AIFF, not MP3)
✓ ISRC codes assigned to every recording
✓ Stems available on request
✓ Sub-24-hour response time (tested in the process) Of 20 applications in Month 1: 6 passed all six criteria. The 14 who didn't? We gave each one specific written feedback.
Most gaps are fixable. They can reapply when they're ready. Quality over volume. Every time.
Because supervisors need to trust what we send them. Apply when you're ready: link in bio. #SyncReady #AfricanComposers #SyncMaster #MusicBusiness #BehindTheScenes
